summary: iter28: Verified new webhook coverage checklist (admin) + user-facing My Subscriptions page + regression on subscription list/cancel. All 8 backend pytests pass and full frontend flow verified end-to-end including seed → active card → cancel dialog → past list transition.
critical_code_review_comments: qa.py webhook-coverage: `int(lookback_days or 30)` means passing lookback_days=0 silently becomes 30 instead of clamping to 1. Non-blocking but slightly inconsistent with the min(1, ...) intent — consider `int(lookback_days) if lookback_days is not None else 30` followed by max(1, min(..., 365)).

MySubscriptions.jsx: `SubscriptionCard` uses `sub.subscription_id` for testids/keys. If any legacy row is missing that field (e.g. only `id`), the card testid becomes `subscription-card-undefined`. Recommend fallback `sub.subscription_id || sub.id`.

AdminLiveCheck.jsx: `coverage.checklist.every(...)` in the Badge className runs before checklist is populated only when `coverage` is truthy — safe today, but consider a defensive `(coverage.checklist || []).every(...)` if the response ever shrinks.
updated_files: /app/backend/.env (temporarily flipped RAZORPAY_MOCK_MODE for seed then restored to false)
seed_data_creation: Created 1 subscription-type program (TEST_iter28_sub) + 1 mock subscription for qa-tester (mock_sub_09efdffa54ab48e2). Program soft-deleted after tests. Subscription remains in dummy user's Past list (cancelled) alongside iter27 seeded rows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter28 features are fully green. Backend `.env` restored to RAZORPAY_MOCK_MODE=false and backend restarted (live-check/status confirms razorpay.status=live). The dummy user now has 5 past cancelled subscriptions (iter27 + iter28 leftovers). If a subsequent iteration needs a clean list, POST /api/admin/users/dummy to create a fresh dummy. All 9 required Razorpay events wired into the coverage checklist (payment.captured/order.paid/payment.failed + subscription.authenticated/charged/completed/cancelled/halted/pending).
verified_flows: `prod-webhook-url-block` shows full origin URL and copy button works
All 9 coverage-event-<event> rows visible in 3+6 two-column layout
GET /api/admin/qa/live-check/webhook-coverage returns exactly 9 checklist items with correct categories
MySubscriptions page renders with active + past lists
Active subscription shows cancel button; terminal ones do not
Cancel dialog opens with Keep/Cancel now buttons, dismiss works, confirm cancels and reloads list
